spec.name: Under Water In The Sewer
spec.description: You are swimming in some dirty water and are holding your breath. You'd better continue onwards before you drown. It is a good thing that you can hold your light above the water-level.

north.description: It is hard to see, but it looks like the drain runs slightly upwards.

south.description: It is hard to see, but it looks like the drain runs a little bit upwards.
